title: cyclosorus hosei
intro: Cyclosorus hosei, also known as the Tosa fern, is a type of vascular plant belonging to the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cyclosorus hosei include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Cyclosorus hosei is typically prepared as an infusion or decoction, and it has also been used as a poultice to apply directly to the affected area.
